name: Selank
summary: Selank is a synthetic tuftsin-analog heptapeptide used in Russia as an anxiolytic and nootropic, offering benzodiazepine-comparable anxiety relief without sedation, tolerance, or dependence.
mechanism:
Selank is a structural analog of tuftsin, an endogenous tetrapeptide (Thr-Lys-Pro-Arg) cleaved from the Fc region of IgG with immunomodulatory roles. Selank adds a Pro-Gly-Pro tail for metabolic stability and nootropic activity. Rather than binding the benzodiazepine site on GABA-A receptors, it modulates GABAergic tone indirectly, altering expression of GABA-A receptor subunit genes, which provides a molecular basis for anxiolytic activity without classic benzodiazepine sedation, amnesia, or tolerance.

Selank also modulates serotonin, dopamine, and norepinephrine systems and inhibits enkephalin degradation, raising leu-enkephalin levels (which are reduced in anxiety/asthenia and correlate with symptom severity). Its plasma half-life is only 2-3 minutes, but the Pro-Gly-Pro tail is cleaved into longer-acting tuftsin-like metabolites that retain GABAergic and immunomodulatory effects, so behavioral effects far outlast plasma presence.
benefits: Anxiolytic effects comparable to low-dose benzodiazepines without sedation
No tolerance, dependence, or withdrawal in studied use
Antiasthenic and mild psychostimulant effects (unlike benzodiazepines)
Raises leu-enkephalin and modulates BDNF/serotonin for mood and resilience
risks: Human evidence is largely Russian-language; limited Western replication
Not FDA-approved; research-grade product quality varies
sideEffects: Mild fatigue or drowsiness in some users

dosage.notes: Intranasal 250-500 mcg, 1-3x daily; some need up to ~900 mcg/day in divided doses for noticeable anxiolysis. Oral bioavailability is effectively zero (gastric peptidases), so intranasal delivery is required for partial nose-to-brain transport.

halfLife: Plasma 2-3 minutes; behavioral/biochemical effects last hours to days via active metabolites
cycleLength: Often 2-3 week courses (mirroring Russian GAD protocols), or as-needed; can be used daily during anxious periods

reconstitution.notes: A 10 mg vial in 2 mL yields 5 mg/mL; reconstitute into a metered nasal-spray bottle and calibrate spray volume to deliver the target mcg per actuation. Bacteriostatic water or sterile saline are suitable for nasal use.

storage: Store lyophilized vial frozen; refrigerate (2-8 C) after reconstitution; nasal-spray solution best used within 2-4 weeks; protect from light and heat.

interactions.note: Classic Russian nootropic stack: Selank's calming, anxiolytic profile balances Semax's stimulating, focus/BDNF-driven effects; the two are frequently dosed together for combined cognition plus anxiety relief.
Both increase GABAergic tone via different mechanisms; combined sedation/additive effects are possible, though Selank itself is non-sedating.

references.title: Selank Administration Affects the Expression of Some Genes Involved in GABAergic Neurotransmission (PMC)
Selank: GABAergic Gene Expression (Frontiers in Pharmacology)
Efficacy and possible mechanisms of action of a new peptide anxiolytic selank in GAD and neurasthenia (ResearchGate)
Selank — Molecular Specifications & Research Monograph (Peptide Biologix)
